name: python3-jaraco.collections
title: python3-jaraco.collections
summary: models and classes to supplement the stdlib 'collections' module
description:
models and classes to supplement the stdlib 'collections' module
Jaraco.collections provides additional models and classes in the spirit
of stdlib's collections, mostly needed as a dependency of other projects
including 'cherrypy'.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-jaraco.collections because models and classes to supplement the stdlib 'collections' module.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-jaraco.collections as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-jaraco.collections with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-jaraco.collections --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
